## Testing channel update

- Includes the complete current testing-channel Android update: disk-aware remaining downloads, peer presence and last-seen state, message search, expressive chat bubbles and emphasis effects, theme palette updates, revised chat controls, and their tests/documentation.
- Regenerates Android strings directly from the latest editable workbook without changing the workbook contents.
- Keeps the v0.3.7 one-time reset migration and one-web/one-Android pairing slots.
- Includes the latest web remaining-download folder scan and its tests.
